title: Invero® 4x Set of Mini Stoneware Rectangular Coloured Small Oven to Table Baking Dish ideal for Lasagne, Pies, Casserole, Tapas and more
features: HIGH QUALITY: These Invero 4X Set of Mini Stoneware Rectangular Coloured Small Oven to Table Baking Dish Ideal for Lasagne, Pies, Casserole and More are the perfect size. Made with high quality ceramic material and made microwave, oven and dishwasher safe they feature handles for easier carrying (use caution when hot) include - red, blue, orange and green colours.

MICROWAVE SAFE: These Invero Mini Stoneware Rectangular Coloured Oven to Table Baking Dishes can be taken straight from the oven to the table, are dishwasher safe and microwave safe up to 200C. Featuring handles for easier carrying (use caution when hot), these stoneware baking dishes are also suitable for use in conventional ovens, freezer and fridge/freezer.

EASY TO CARRY: Each dish can also be used to display your meal at the table when served with handles that allow easy carrying without compromising on style. These 4 small rectangular baking dishes from Invero are the perfect size for lasagnas and pies, or just to serve up small portions of your favourite food items.

VERSATILE AND DURABLE: Accent your kitchen with this elegant Rectangular Stoneware Baking Dish, in a four pack of vibrant colours. Small enough to fit in the microwave and easy to store in your oven, these durable dishes are versatile enough for everything from lasagnes, to pies and casseroles.

LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE: These small dishes are perfect for use in the kitchen or when taking food to friends and family. Ideal for lasagne, pies, casseroles and tapas. Featuring dimensions - approximately 13cm x 9cm x 4cm (including handles)
description: Product Description Cook and serve on the same dish with our set of 4 square contemporary oven baking dishes with handles. These square and rectangular stoneware dishes are the perfect size to serve your delicious side dishes, desserts or main meals at the table. Safe up to 200 degrees C, they are also dishwasher and microwave safe. Add colour and versatility to your kitchen with this handy 4-piece set of Invero mini stoneware rectangular shaped baking dishes.
